title: dactylorhiza kerryensis
intro: Dactylorhiza kerryensis, also known as the Kerry Marsh Orchid, is a species of orchid found in Ireland and the UK. It is a terrestrial orchid, belonging to the genus Dactylorhiza, characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and purple flowers. Dactylorhiza kerryensis has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with reported health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function.
